Gluten-Free Breakfast Cereals

Deliciously Gluten-Free!

Discover the JERRY series by Nerano – healthy, tasty, and 100% gluten-free breakfast cereals for the entire family.

Our Products

Jerry Breakfast Cereals

Jerry – Inspiration and Passion for Gluten-Free Taste!

We once thought that a gluten-free breakfast had to be bland and joyless. That was before Jerry appeared! Our Jerry breakfast cereal line is the result of years of commitment and experience in creating healthy, delicious food.

  • Jerry is the result of our culinary experiments and our relentless pursuit of the perfect recipe. We wanted to create something that would be perfect not only for people with gluten intolerance, but also for everyone who simply loves tasty and healthy breakfasts.

  • We know how many children today struggle with food intolerances. Jerry is our answer to these challenges – created for the youngest foodies who deserve a joyful and safe meal every day.

  • In many traditional breakfast cereals, gluten plays the leading role. In Jerry cereals, the main ingredient is our love for taste and a healthy lifestyle. The absence of gluten is our recipe for a delicious morning.

  • Every stage of creating Jerry is a source of pride for us. We believe that naturalness is the key to true flavor, which is why our gluten-free cereals contain no unnecessary additives. Their ingredients are 100% simple and transparent.

Jerry is more than just breakfast cereal. It’s a piece of our heart that we want to share with you and your family. Try Jerry cereals and join our gluten-free revolution, full of flavor and smiles!

#JerryGlutenFree #ForKids #GlutenFreeTaste #HealthyBreakfast #TasteWithoutGluten
Choco Balls NAS Choco Shells NAS Choco Balls Honey Rings Choco Smiles Cinnamon Shells Choco Shells Strawberry Balls Vanilla Balls

We respond to consumer needs in the Free From category!

Health Benefits

Carefully selected top-quality ingredients guarantee real support for your body. Our products are 100% free from artificial colors and flavors.

Uncompromising Taste

The taste is in no way inferior to traditional gluten-containing products, and compared to other gluten-free alternatives, it stands out with an absolutely outstanding flavor profile.

Real Choice

Instead of limitations – unique and innovative solutions. We are a brand that fully meets the previously unmet needs of consumers in the gluten-free cereal category.

Our Product Range

JERRY Choco Balls NO Added SUGAR

New 250g Gluten-Free No Added Sugar High in Fibre

Intensely chocolatey, crunchy balls – delicious and completely free from added sugar!

100% free from:
  • Gluten
  • Wheat Starch
  • Eggs
  • Nuts
  • Palm Oil
  • Glucose Syrup
  • GMO
  • Preservatives
  • Soy

  • Palm Oil
  • Glucose Syrup
  • GMO
  • Preservatives
  • Soy

About us

Who are we?

First and foremost, we are a group of people who not only understand the market from a business perspective, but also know how to listen to every consumer.

This is precisely what sets us apart from the competition – we are not just another company stumbling through the fog of sales. We respond to the growing awareness of consumers and ensure that their needs become reality, not just wishful thinking. Thanks to the vast industry experience of our entire team and an understanding of the needs of every player in the sales cycle – from wholesalers to individual customers – we are able to identify products destined for sales success.

Consumer convenience

Consumers have no trouble finding the products we bring to market.

We offer sales through our own online store and work with small-format shops, deli chains, super- and hypermarket chains, and petrol stations.

Modern trade

Marketing solutions making the most of the tools of our time.

Collaboration with key players in individual sales sectors, continuous research, and immediate response to market needs – all of this allows us not only to fill niches, but also to enter markets that appear saturated.

Import-Export

Our goal is to fill the market and introduce the diversity we know from Western markets.

An end to the dominance of well-known brands – Polish consumers deserve the power of choice. But we don't stop at the Polish market. We also want to help our eastern and southern neighbours satisfy this dynamic industry. Together, our ambitions will become reality.
